cards.caption: An encrypted-email company issuing a statement about the gaming industry. Fun bit, but it's a niche in-joke, not signal a tech gamer needs.

cards.hook: "Indie games will save gaming" is a lie.
cards.caption: "Indie games will save gaming" is a lie. This dev finally says why the whole savior narrative was always kinda silly. The hot take my feed keeps and the timeline buries.
cards.stance: Indie isn't a rescue plan for the industry — it's a coping mechanism.

cards.hook: All 15 biggest game reveals from July 2026.
cards.caption: Every major announcement, gameplay drop, and trailer showcase from June-July 2026 in one place. The reveals my feed surfaced before your timeline caught up.

cards.hook: Xbox promised a reset. It shipped layoffs.
cards.caption: New logo, charm offensive, big "reset" talk — and the actual news was layoffs, studio closures, and spin-offs. The story under the rebrand my feed caught first.
cards.stance: A fancy new logo is what a platform ships when it has nothing else to announce.

cards.caption: Bare link-and-hashtags post on the Xbox reset. Same story as the layoffs card but with no substance of its own, so I'd run that one instead.

cards.hook: Alien: Isolation 2 is real — official trailer dropped.
cards.caption: Alien: Isolation 2 got its official reveal at Summer Game Fest 2026, Geoff Keighley hosting. The sequel horror fans waited a decade for. Found before the timeline.

cards.hook: Why live-service games hit a "maintenance" wall
cards.caption: A decent thought on the live-service lifecycle, but the snippet cuts off before the actual insight lands. No payoff on the card, so it reads flat.

cards.hook: Valve just gave Half-Life: Alyx official mod tools.
cards.caption: Valve dropped Workshop tools for Half-Life: Alyx and added Linux support. The VR classic is now fully moddable. The dev-native drop my feed keeps and the algo skips.
